brief.speaker: carol
brief.text: Start with our engagement ledger. I want to see the first ten rows. Just so we know what we're looking at.

expected.sql: SELECT engagement_id, client_id, era, year, anomaly_note FROM chrono_engagements LIMIT 10

hints.text: Carol: 'I asked for ten. Show me ten.'
Carol: 'The table is called chrono_engagements. Plural.'
Carol: 'Pick the columns you want. Name the table. Ten rows.'

success.speaker: carol
success.text: Carol nods. 'Right. Era, year, client_id. That id refers to a name on the client roster, but you have to ask the roster for it.'
